description_long: This object is a compact revolver-style handgun with a short barrel and a robust, solid frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured and appears to be made of a textured, matte black material, likely polymer or rubber, providing a secure hold. The frame and barrel are metallic, finished in a dark, slightly glossy tone, with visible cylinder fluting and a prominent trigger guard. The revolver features a hammer at the rear and a cylinder with multiple chambers, typical of double-action revolvers. There are subtle engravings and markings on the frame, including a circular logo and other small details. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, suitable for concealed carry or personal defense in urban environments.
description: A compact, dark-finished revolver handgun with a textured ergonomic grip and a short, solid barrel. The design is robust and practical, featuring subtle engravings and a prominent trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including the textured grip, fluted cylinder, and engraved logo on the frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, muzzle, and the rounded front of the cylinder.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, displaying the grip, trigger, hammer, and cylinder release latch.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, hammer, and the rear sight channel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and a flared base for secure handling. Its surface is covered in a matte, stippled texture, likely made from polymer or rubber, providing enhanced grip and comfort. The grip features subtle finger grooves for improved ergonomics and a visible circular logo embedded near the top. The overall design is practical, with no ornate embellishments, focusing on functionality and control.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a moderate thickness that offers both protection and comfort. It features a smooth, slightly matte finish and a gentle undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. The guard is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no squared-off edges or accessory rails, emphasizing a classic revolver style.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and solid, typical of a snub-nose revolver, with a smooth, slightly glossy exterior. It has a standard round profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. The barrel is integrated into the frame, and there are no external markings or fluting visible on its surface.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible markings include a circular manufacturer logo on the left side of the frame above the trigger area and subtle engraved lines on the cylinder. There are no prominent model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations visible in the provided views. The markings are understated and blend with the dark finish.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a detachable magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is rounded and slightly flared, with a smooth, continuous contour and no finger rest, logo, or additional texturing beyond the stippled grip surface.
